Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss
Off Calendar Oct-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brian Soriano, Esq. 415-593-7333 of BES for Plaintiff.
Darren Cottriel, Esq. 949-851-3939 of Jones Day for Defendant LENNAR CORPORATION et al.
Alan Palmer Jacobus, Esq. 347-463-5190 for Defendant Mark Company.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff cites an Appellate case. Defendant responds. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LENNAR CORPORATION, HPS1 BLOCK 50 LLC, HPS1 BLOCK 53 LLC, HPS1 BLOCK 54 LLC, HPS1 BLOCK 51, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Dismiss or in the alternative stay Proceedings.

Taken Under Submission. The Court will look at cases cited by both sides, will take another look at the equittable estoppel argument and whether the Court should exercise its discretion to deny the petition assuming California Law and CCP 1281.26 applies. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Counsel for Lennar submits a proposed order to the Court and is instructed to email a word version to the Contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
